personality_one_liner: A premium, cinematic, members-only financial vault featuring dark frosted glass, sharp typography, and subtle glowing emerald accents over deep obsidian.

spacing.rule: Generous editorial spacing. Let the numbers breathe. Group related financial data tightly, but separate major sections with large margins.

do's: Use heavy blur (20-40px) combined with a tinted base (e.g., rgba(15,15,15,0.4)) for all elevated cards over the dark cinematic backgrounds.
Apply a subtle 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.08)) to glass cards to give them a crisp edge.
Use glass on the bottom tab bar, sticky headers, and the primary Net Worth hero card.
Ensure contrast is AAA by using near-white text on dark glass cards.
dont's: Never apply glassmorphism to form inputs or dense rows of standard list data.
Do not rely purely on blur; always include a dark translucent background fill to preserve text readability.
Do not stack more than 2 glass layers on top of each other.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: A commanding overview of the user's financial life, centered around their Net Worth.

states.loading: Shimmering dark translucent skeletons over the background.
states.empty: No data state: 'Connect an account to calculate your Net Worth' with a premium line-art vault icon.
states.error: Discreet inline error banner: 'Unable to sync offline data. Check storage.' with retry button.

screens.layout: Hero Section: Large glass card spanning the top with 'Net Worth' displayed in massive Fraunces font, layered over a subtle textured/metallic background. Below it, pill chips showing split of Assets vs Liabilities. Middle Section: Horizontal swipeable glass cards for top bank accounts. Bottom Section: Recent transactions list with solid surfaceSecondary backgrounds, grouped by date. Include an extruded/glow central FAB in the bottom nav for adding transactions.

screens.name: Transactions (Income & Expense)
screens.purpose: Detailed tracking and categorization of cash flow.

states.loading: Spinner centered in the chart area.
states.empty: 'No transactions found for this period' with a sleek minimalist illustration.

screens.layout: Top: Segmented control (Income / Expense). Middle: A sleek, dark-themed donut chart (using react-native-gifted-charts) showing category breakdowns. Bottom: Vertical list of transactions. Each transaction uses a left icon inside a brandTertiary tinted circle, with the amount aligned right. Profit/Income in Emerald, Expense in soft white/gray.

screens.name: Portfolios & Loans
screens.purpose: Track mutual funds, stocks, loans, and peer-to-peer lending.

states.empty: Prompt to 'Add your first Investment or Loan' with a clear CTA.

screens.layout: Tabbed view at the top (Investments | Loans | Relatives). Investments view: Vertical stack of glass cards showing stock/MF name, invested vs current value, and a small green/red sparkline. Loans view: Cards showing total outstanding, next EMI date, and a progress bar mapping paid vs remaining. Minimal text, high contrast.

screens.name: Analytics
screens.purpose: Deep dive into financial trends with interactive charts.

states.empty: Not enough data to generate trends.

screens.layout: Grid of small insight cards (Cash flow, top spending category). Large interactive line chart for Monthly Trends. Use dark gradients under the line charts. Filter chips at the top (1M, 3M, 1Y, YTD).

hero_background.alt: Subtle abstract wavy metallic texture to sit behind the primary glass hero cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for the Indian context: Date format DD/MM/YYYY and Currency ₹ (INR).

Adhere strictly to the Glass / Luxe DARK personality. The user asked for a CRED/Groww/INDMoney aesthetic, which means deep dark obsidian backgrounds, high-end typography (use Fraunces for large numbers), and frosted glass cards.
BANNED: Do not use any shades of Blue, Indigo, Violet, or Purple. Period. Use Emerald (#00D084) for positive/brand actions and warm grays/whites for primary text.

Implement glassmorphism correctly: Combine a semi-transparent dark fill (e.g., rgba(15,15,15, 0.4)) with background blur (20-40px) and a 1px faint border. Use this for the Net Worth hero card, bottom sheet headers, and the bottom tab bar.
The FAB should be placed centrally in the bottom navigation. Give it a distinct tactile presence (extruded or glowing) to serve as the main 'Add' action for transactions.
Because the app is 100% offline, omit all login/signup screens. The app boots directly to the Dashboard or an initial offline setup flow.
For all charts, use react-native-gifted-charts. Style them with dark backgrounds and vivid accent lines (emerald) with a gradient fade beneath the line.
Incorporate Local Notifications logic natively for EMIs and recurring reminders.
Every transaction input must explicitly link to a specific bank account from the local SQLite (Room equivalent in RN) DB.
Maintain strict typographic discipline: Limit font weights to 400 and 500. Hierarchy must be established via size (Fraunces for huge metrics, Geist for labels).
